DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOCELYN CRUIZ (ADMINISTRATOR) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AIDLIFE HOME CARE, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF AIDLIFE HOME CARE LLC. IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS JOCELYN CRUZ. DEFENDANT LOLA MILLER IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LUIS MILLER IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-01-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $111.75 AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, LOLA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,746.68 FILED BY AIDLIFE HOME CARE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, LOLA MILLER, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AIDLIFE HOME CARE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, LOLA MILLER, LUIS $3,746.68 PRINCIPAL, $218.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,965.18, DEFENDANTS BOTH DEFAULTED (FAILED TO APPEAR) WITH VALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF HAD EXCEPTIONALLY ORGANIZED DOCUMENTATION WHICH PROVED THE CLAIM AMOUNT REQUESTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
